Bash(node -e "const pg = require\(''pg''\); require\(''dotenv''\).config\({ path: ''../../.env.local'' }\); const pool = new pg.Pool\({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL }\); pool.query\(''SELECT u.id, b.balance_usd, b.free_tokens_remaining FROM users u JOIN user_balances b ON b.user_id = u.id''\).then\(r => { r.rows.forEach\(row => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(row\)\)\); return pool.query\(""SELECT SUM\(output_tokens\) as total_output, SUM\(input_tokens\) as total_input, COUNT\(*\) as msg_count FROM messages WHERE output_tokens > 0""\); }\).then\(r => { r.rows.forEach\(row => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(row\)\)\); return pool.end\(\); }\);")
